Preferred_Parent.Parent_String: costume components [300212998], components by specific context [300241584], components (objects parts) [300241583], Components (hierarchy name) [300241490], Objects Facet [300264092]

Non-Preferred_Parent.Parent_String: sleeves (object genre) [300418002], object genres by form [300117144], object genres (object classifications) [300185712], Object Genres (hierarchy name) [300185711], Objects Facet [300264092]

Descriptive_Note.Note_Text: Shaped coverings for the arm. Originally made separate from the main garment and attached by lacing through eyelets at the shoulder; later, often made as component parts of garments.

Source.Source_ID: 2000001681/Livandi, Thesaurus of Clothing and Textile Terms, Personal Artifacts (1990)

Descriptive_Note.Note_Text: Gevormde bedekkingen voor de arm die oorspronkelijk afzonderlijk van de belangrijkste kleding werden gemaakt en eraan werden bevestigd door middel van veters door oogjes die bij de schouders vastzaten. Later vaak gemaakt als onderdeel van kledingstukken.
遮蔽手臂部份的衣物。原本與服裝主體分開，穿戴時用繫帶穿過肩部的小圓孔將衣袖接起。後來才與衣服縫為一體，成為衣服的一部份。
Geformte Bedeckung für den Arm. Ursprünglich getrennt von der Hauptkleidung und durch Schnürung und Ösen an der Schulter befestigt; später oft als Komponente eines Kleidungsstückes.

Source.Source_ID: 2000001681/Livandi, Thesaurus of Clothing and Textile Terms, Personal Artifacts (1990)

Term_Source.Page: illustration, Vol. 2, "Vocabulary of Basic Terms for Cataloguing Costume" - ICOM International Committee.

Source.Source_ID: 2000030201/National Museum of American History, Dictionary of Costume (n.d.)
